description_long: This object is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a robust, matte black finish. It features a single, thick barrel with a short length, suggesting a design optimized for close-quarters use. The stock is angular and ergonomic, with a thumbhole grip for improved handling and control. The receiver area is blocky and solid, with a visible lever mechanism beneath, indicating a lever-action operation. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers and enhanced safety. Overall, the shotgun has a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black lever-action shotgun with a thumbhole stock and a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the thick, single barrel profile.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the lever mechanism, and the angular thumbhole stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's thumbhole design and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lever, trigger guard, and the overall compact build.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard with an elongated shape and smooth contour
